fields.name: Fin. Charge Terms Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the finance charge terms for which you want to set up foreign currency information.
The program copies this code from the Code field in the Finance Charge Terms table.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the currency in which you want to define finance charge terms.

fields.name: Additional Fee
fields.tooltip: Specifies a fee amount in foreign currency. The currency of this amount is determined by the currency code.
